resource.name: configurationError
resource.object: An error occurred while getting configuration for trimming programs form.

resource.name: setBuffersLookUpError
resource.object: Unable to apply buffer lookup data.

resource.name: cancelEditError
resource.object: An error occurred while cancelling changes.

resource.name: saveDataError
resource.object: An error occurred while saving changed.

resource.name: addNewProgramError
resource.object: An error occurred while adding new program.

resource.name: cloneProgramError
resource.object: An error occurred while cloning program.

resource.name: qcSccLimit.ToolTip
resource.object: Limit for the Trimmer Maximum planned inspection method, set to Ok to disable.\n A trimmer will be eligible for priority inspection \nif any inspection exceeds this score class.

resource.name: qcAvgLimit.ToolTip
resource.object: Limit for the Trimmer Average planned inspect method. A trimmer will be eligible \nfor priority inspection if his average score exceeds this limit.

resource.name: qcSccAny.ToolTip
resource.object: Number of pieces to inspect of any product when any \ninspection score exceeds the Trimmer Maximum limit.

resource.name: qcSccProduct.ToolTip
resource.object: Number of pieces of failed inspection product to inspect \nwhen the average score exceeds the Trimmer Maximum limit.

resource.name: qcRate.ToolTip
resource.object: A table that defines inspection rates for products.

resource.name: createDefaultProgramReleasesError
resource.object: Unable to create default release sequences.

resource.name: flushSystemDataButton.ToolTip
resource.object: Flush pending line data to database

resource.name: FlushSystemDataButton.Hint
resource.object: Flush pending line data to database

resource.name: flushStationDataButton.ToolTip
resource.object: Flush data from station to database

resource.name: drawLineDetailsError
resource.object: An error occurred while drawing details on line {0}

resource.name: employeeToStationError
resource.object: Unable to log employee to station.

resource.name: setPrunitTargetsError
resource.object: Unable to set targets for process unit.

resource.name: setStationPrunit
resource.object: Unable to set process unit for station.

resource.name: employeeFromStationError
resource.object: Unable to log employee from station.

resource.name: setPrunitActivityError
resource.object: Unable to change activity on process unit.

resource.name: refreshLineError
resource.object: An error occurred while refreshing line data.

resource.name: gettingLineStateError
resource.object: An error occurred while getting state of line {0}

resource.name: updateStationError
resource.object: An error occurred while updating station.

resource.name: refreshLinesButton.Hint
resource.object: Get current state on all lines

resource.name: employeeToSubStationError
resource.object: Unable to log employee to sub-station

resource.name: employeeFromSubStationError
resource.object: Unable to log employee from sub-station.

resource.name: refreshDataError
resource.object: An error occurred while refreshing data.

resource.name: stationMissing
resource.object: Station Id missing. See base_sysprograms.xmldata for sysprogram {0}

resource.name: trimlineMissing
resource.object: Trimming line Id missing. Check xmldata in the user interface items

resource.name: trlnQcLicenseNeeded
resource.object: Can't get trimming line QC station license

resource.name: qccontextNotDefined
resource.object: Qc inspection material not defined for the trimming program output materials

resource.name: ScanProductEmployeeNotFound
resource.object: Employee/product were not found from scan: {0}

resource.name: doDeletePiece
resource.object: Do you want to delete piece?

resource.name: distributionOk
resource.object: Inspection distribution between employees is equilibrated

resource.name: distributionNotOk
resource.object: Inspection distribution between employees is skewed

resource.name: noProdMatParChosen
resource.object: You must choose at least one product, product type or parent product

resource.name: stationMissing
resource.object: Station Id missing. See base_sysprograms.xmldata for sysprogram {0}

resource.name: doDeletePiece
resource.object: Do you want to delete piece?

resource.name: OnlyOnIPC
resource.object: This CE only runs on IPC's

resource.name: TrimmingSystemMissingInXml
resource.object: Trimming system ID missing from XML configuration

resource.name: ApplicationMismatch
resource.object: Trimming system application does not match UI application. This can cause problems."

resource.name: refreshDataError
resource.object: An error occured while refreshing data.

resource.name: NoFixEmployee
resource.object: No fixed employee found for station

resource.name: TrimmingLinesExpand
resource.object: Expand to show list of available Trimming Lines

resource.name: trimExists
resource.object: A trimming system with this name already exists. Please select another name.

resource.name: shname
resource.object: You must specify a short prefix since another trimming system does exist in the database

resource.name: AppExists
resource.object: An application with this name already exists. If you wish to use that application please select it from the list.

resource.name: wsServerInstalled
resource.object: Innova Web Server installed with id: {0}

resource.name: ipAddressRangeStartLabel.Text
resource.object: Start of IP Address range for stations:

resource.name: trimExists
resource.object: A trimming system with this name already exists. Please select another name.

resource.name: shname
resource.object: You must specify a short prefix since another trimming system does exist in the database

resource.name: AppExists
resource.object: An application with this name already exists. If you wish to use that application please select it from the list.

resource.name: DoDelete
resource.object: Do you want to delete last record from {0} for {1} {2}?

resource.name: DoDeleteNoEmp
resource.object: Do you want to delete last record of {0} {1}?
